== Notes for [[Item:Q104197|Q104197]] ==

Merchant in Bruges. Prior of the Spanish Council in Bruges

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1859528/unitid/ES-AGI-41091-UD-1859528+-+ES-AGI-41091-UD-6049264/search/0/Polanco

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000076397209875

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
